title: How to create an AI Agent
description: Step-by-step guide to creating your first personalized AI betting agent on WagerProof.

content.text: Creating an agent takes just a few minutes. Here's how to get started.

steps.title: Go to the Agents tab
steps.description: Navigate to the Agents section from the sidebar (web) or bottom tab bar (mobile).

steps.title: Tap 'Create Agent'
steps.description: Click the create button to start the agent creation flow.

steps.title: Choose a name and avatar
steps.description: Give your agent a unique name and select a visual style.

steps.title: Select an archetype
steps.description: Pick a starting personality template. Options include Conservative Grinder, Analytics Purist, Trend Surfer, and more. This sets sensible defaults for all parameters.

steps.title: Fine-tune parameters
steps.description: Optionally adjust individual personality settings like risk tolerance, preferred bet types, unit sizing, and analysis priorities.

steps.title: Save and generate
steps.description: Save your agent and generate its first set of picks for today's games.

content.text: Start with an archetype that matches your betting style, then tweak parameters over time as you see how the agent performs.
Pro subscribers can create up to 5 agents. If you want to try a new strategy, you can deactivate or delete an existing agent to free up a slot.
